steps.title: Locate the median position
steps.content: There are $31$ values, so the median is the $\dfrac{31+1}{2} = 16$th value when the data is sorted in increasing order. Walk through the frequency table accumulating counts until the running total reaches $16$.

steps.title: Find the temperature at position 16
steps.content:
Adding up the frequencies bin by bin in order, the running total first reaches $16$ in the bin for $33^{\circ}\text{F}$ — meaning the 16th sorted value falls in that bin.

So the median is $33^{\circ}\text{F}$.

The answer is 33.
